case_title: JAMES V. COSTANTINI VS. ELLIOT SILBER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COSTANTINI, JAMES V. AS TO DEFENDANT SILBER, ELLIOT
DECLARATION RE: DEFENDANT'S UPDATED ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT SILBER, ELLIOT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JAMES V. CONSTANTINI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELLIOT SILBER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY COSTANTINI, JAMES V. AS TO DEFENDANT SILBER, ELLIOT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED APR-24-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILBER, ELLIOT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSTANTINI, JAMES V. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SILBER, ELLIOT THE MOTORCYCLE WAS SOLD "AS IS" DEFENDANT DID NOT KNOWINGLY MISREPRESENT THE CONDITION OF THE MOTORCYCLE. THE PLAINTIFF UNDERTOOK NO DUE DILIGENCE PRIOR TO THE PURCHASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
